title: hymenophyllum ferax
intro: Hymenophyllum ferax is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum ferax include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
